title: WPC Decking & Outdoor Flooring
shortDescription: Premium waterproof outdoor wooden flooring. Enjoy the luxury of real wood on your balcony or swimming pool without any rotting, fading, or termite problems.
longDescription:
Upgrade your balconies, farmhouses, and swimming pool decks with Goals Floors' Premium WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) Decking. If you want the beautiful look of natural wood outdoors but are worried about rain, sun, and termites, this is the ultimate solution.

Unlike real wood that rots or loses its color, our WPC decking is 100% waterproof and weatherproof. It easily survives the heavy monsoons and extreme summer heat of Gurugram and Delhi NCR without fading. It has a special anti-slip surface, making it completely safe for kids and elderly people, even when wet. Enjoy a luxury outdoor space with zero maintenance and no yearly polishing.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Weatherproof
features.description: Completely safe from heavy rain and moisture. It absorbs zero water, meaning it will never swell, rot, or crack like natural wood.

features.title: Lifetime Termite Proof
features.description: Made with a strong polymer composite core that insects cannot eat. It is completely safe from termites and borers for its entire life.

features.title: Heat & Sun Resistant
features.description: Specially built to handle the harsh Delhi NCR summer. It features a UV-protected shield so the beautiful color will not fade under direct sunlight.

features.title: Anti-Slip Safety
features.description: The surface has a natural wood texture that gives excellent grip. It is not slippery even when wet, making it very safe around swimming pools.

features.title: Zero Yearly Maintenance
features.description: There is no need to spend money on expensive polishing, varnishing, or pest control every year. It stays beautiful naturally.

features.title: Feels Like Real Hardwood
features.description: It looks and feels exactly like premium natural timber, giving your outdoor living space a highly luxurious and expensive finish.

installation: The flooring is installed on a strong metal frame (Aluminum or Iron) to keep it above the ground, allowing rainwater to drain easily underneath. The wooden planks are locked together using a smart hidden-clip system. This means there are no ugly screws visible on the top of your beautiful floor.
maintenance: It is extremely easy to clean. You can simply wash it with a garden water hose. For stubborn dirt or bird droppings, just use mild soap and a soft brush. No expensive wood polish is ever required.

faqs.question: What exactly is WPC Decking?
faqs.answer: WPC stands for Wood Plastic Composite. It is an advanced outdoor flooring material that looks and feels like real wood but is completely waterproof and termite-proof.

faqs.question: Can I use this around my swimming pool?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! It has a special anti-slip surface that provides excellent grip even when wet, making it highly recommended and safe for pool areas.

faqs.question: Will it rot or swell during the heavy monsoons?
faqs.answer: No. Unlike natural wood, WPC absorbs zero water. It will never rot, swell, or get damaged, even if it rains heavily for days.

faqs.question: Does the color fade in the hot summer sun?
faqs.answer: Our premium decking is UV-protected. It is specifically designed to handle the extreme heat of Delhi NCR without losing its rich, beautiful color.

faqs.question: Can I install it directly on the soil or mud in my garden?
faqs.answer: No, it cannot be placed directly on the soil. It must be installed on a strong metal frame to ensure proper water drainage and ventilation underneath the floor.

faqs.question: Do I need to polish it every year like real wood?
faqs.answer: Not at all. This is one of its biggest advantages. It requires absolutely zero polishing or painting, saving you a lot of maintenance money over the years.

faqs.question: Is it safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, the core is made of a polymer composite which insects cannot eat. It is 100% termite and borer proof for its entire lifetime.

faqs.question: Does the floor get very hot in the summer?
faqs.answer: Like any outdoor surface (including tiles or real wood), it will get warm under direct afternoon sun. You can easily cool it down by splashing some water before using the space.

faqs.question: How are the planks fixed? Will I see the screws?
faqs.answer: We use a hidden clip system. Stainless steel clips lock the planks together from the sides, so no ugly screws or nails are visible on the top surface.

faqs.question: Do you supply WPC decking for large farmhouse projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We offer special project pricing, ready stocks, and expert installation for architects and builders across Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida.

installationSteps.title: Make the Metal Frame
points: Create a strong base frame using Aluminum or Iron pipes.
Keep a slight slope so that rainwater can drain easily underneath.

installationSteps.title: Fix the First Board
points: Place the first wooden board perfectly straight along the wall.
Secure the starting edge using specialized starter clips.

installationSteps.title: Use Hidden Clips
points: Slide the stainless steel clips into the side grooves of the board.
Screw these clips directly into the metal frame for a tight hold.

installationSteps.title: Leave Expansion Gaps
points: Leave a tiny 5mm gap between the ends of the boards.
This allows the floor to safely expand during the hot summer without bending.
